raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE  
reason=The payout request matches an eligible claim, but the payout hold record does not align on payee_token: request uses PAYEE-1615 while the resolved hold is for PAYEE-9151, so the required payout hold/release reference is inconsistent and should be escalated before execution (B16-15-SRC-01, B16-15-SRC-03, B16-15-SRC-05).
